Decision memo

We are taking B2B workflow automation platform into mid-market SaaS operations teams. The product is B2B workflow automation platform. The market is Mid-market SaaS operations teams.

The locale is GB; geographies include United Kingdom and Ireland. Industries include Software and Professional services. Company size is 1000+.
Titles include Marketing Operations Director and Revenue Operations Manager. Functions include Sales, Marketing, and Operations. Seniorities are VP and Director.

Keywords include revenue operations and workflow automation. Pains include slow lead follow-up and manual handoffs. Triggers include pipeline conversion pressure and CRM migration.

Campaign goal is Trial demand. Preferred channels include microsoft-ads, google-ads-youtube, and linkedin-ads.
